name: Crystal Brilliance
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>玉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>玲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>瓏</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can only control 1 "Crystal Brilliance". Each "Crystal Beast" monster you control gains ATK equal to its original DEF. If a "Crystal Beast" card(s) is placed in your Spell & Trap Zone, even during the Damage Step: You can send this face-up card to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Crystal Beast" monster from your hand or GY, also any damage you take this turn is halved.
eff: You can only control 1 "Crystal Brilliance". Each "Crystal Beast" monster you control gains ATK equal to its original DEF. If a "Crystal Beast" card(s) is placed in your Spell & Trap Zone, even during the Damage Step: You can send this face-up card to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Crystal Beast" monster from your hand or GY, also any damage you take this turn is halved.

sets.set: Structure Deck: Legend of the Crystal Beasts

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: Legend of the Crystals

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
